Uses of Class
fr.maif.IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder

  • Packages that use IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder 
    Package Description
    fr.maif  

    • Uses of IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder in fr.maif

      Methods in fr.maif that return IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder IzanamiClient.newBuilder​(IzanamiConnectionInformation connectionInformation)
      Create a new izanami client builder
      IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder.withBooleanCastStrategy​(BooleanCastStrategy strategy)
      Default strategy to use to cast non-boolean values in boolean when needed.
      IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder.withCacheConfiguration​(FeatureCacheConfiguration cacheConfiguration)
      Specify cache configuration to use fot this client.
      IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder.withCallTimeout​(Duration duration)
      Specify call timeout to use for default HTTP client.
      IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder.withCustomClient​(IzanamiHttpClient client)
      Specify custom http client to use for this client.
      IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder.withErrorStrategy​(FeatureClientErrorStrategy errorStrategy)
      Specify error strategy to use for this client.
      IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder.withPreloadedFeatures​(String... ids)
      Indicate feature to preload
      IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder IzanamiClient.IzanamiClientBuilder.withPreloadedFeatures​(Set<String> ids)
      Indicate feature to preload
